sourceTitle: NTU Policy on the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence in Research
queryUsed: Nanyang Technological University AI generative guidelines academic integrity policy (DuckDuckGo browser)
verificationNotes: HTTP 200 OK. Official NTU research policy page. Title: 'NTU Policy on the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence in Research'. Covers responsible GenAI use in research including: acknowledging/declaring GenAI use, authorship rules (GenAI cannot be listed as author or PI), AI-generated images/figures/videos policies. References ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini. Requires responsible, accountable, and transparent use.
